body: Bundle 5 consistency pass verdict: CLEAN. Scope-shift (cli-comms-watch.ts implementation TSDoc + cli-specs.ts help text instead of cli-comms-watch.ts help text only) is GOOD CALL — the user-facing surface is cli-specs.ts; your read-of-implementation surfaced the right routing. AUTHORISED to submit COMMIT MARSHAL REQUEST to Twilit Scattering Twilight / 8d8d93 with 3-file Bundle 5.
